title: Feature: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Enhancement
body:
## Description
Enhance the existing RBAC system to support dynamic role hierarchy and temporary role assignments.

## Requirements
- Support parent-child role relationships
- Implement role expiration with automatic revocation
- Add role activation/deactivation without deletion
- Create role delegation system

## Acceptance Criteria
- Dynamic role hierarchy working
- Temporary assignments expire correctly
- Role delegation audit trail complete
- All tests passing

title: Feature: Multi-Chain Bridge Implementation
body:
## Description
Implement cross-chain credential bridging to support multiple blockchain networks.

## Requirements
- Support Ethereum, Polygon, and Arbitrum chains
- Implement atomic swap mechanism
- Add chain-specific gas optimization
- Support credential migration

## Acceptance Criteria
- All chains supported
- Atomic operations guaranteed
- Bridge security audited
- Performance benchmarks met

title: Bug: Certificate Verification Fails for Certain Compliance Standards
body:
## Description
Certificate verification returns false for ISO 9001 compliance standard even when all requirements are met.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create certificate with ISO 9001 standard
2. Populate all required fields
3. Call verify_compliance()
4. Observe false return value

## Expected Behavior
Should return true when all requirements satisfied

## Actual Behavior
Returns false consistently

title: Performance: Optimize Certificate Issuance Gas Costs
body:
## Description
Reduce gas consumption for batch certificate issuance by 40%.

## Current State
- Single cert: ~50k gas
- Batch of 100: ~4.8M gas

## Goals
- Reduce batch gas to <3M
- Implement storage optimization
- Use contract-level deduplication

## Success Metrics
- 40% gas reduction measured
- Batch processing time <5s
- Cost savings verified

title: Bug: Progress Tracking Not Recording Module Completion
body:

Student progress shows incomplete modules even after submission, preventing progression to next module.

1. Complete all assignments in module 1
2. Submit work
3. Check progress tracking
4. Observe module not marked complete

## Expected Behavior

## Actual Behavior
Module status remains incomplete

title: Bug: Concurrent Updates Causing Data Corruption
body:
## Description
Simultaneous updates to same record causes corruption.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Update same certificate twice simultaneously
2. Observe conflicting changes

## Expected Behavior
One update overwrites, no corruption

## Actual Behavior
Data corrupted or lost
